title: limonium celticum
intro: Limonium celticum, also known as Sea Lavender or Irish Sea Lavender, is a flowering plant native to the coastal regions of Ireland and the western coast of Europe. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Limonium celticum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for topical application, with the herbal preparation often used to soothe skin irritations and promote relaxation.
